name: TimePicker

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The internal messages that the picker uses to operate

unions.name: Period
unions.comment: Period denotes whether its AM or PM when using 12-hour format

unions.name: TimeEvent
unions.comment: Used to communicate to the caller that the value has been set, changed, or cleared.

unions.name: TimePicker
unions.comment: The base model for the time picker

aliases.name: Settings
aliases.comment:
Contains the configuration that doesn't need to be maintained by the library.

- isHourDisabled - Will be run on the 24-hour version of the hour.
aliases.type: { showHours : Bool, showMinutes : Bool, showSeconds : Bool, use24Hours : Bool, placeholder : String, hourStep : Int, minuteStep : Int, secondStep : Int, disabled : Bool, hideDisabledOptions : Bool, isHourDisabled : Int -> Bool, isMinuteDisabled : Int -> Bool, isSecondDisabled : Int -> Bool, isPeriodDisabled : Period -> Bool }

aliases.name: Time
aliases.comment: The base way to represent time. Hours are always counted in 24-hour format with midnight at 0
aliases.type: { hours : Int, minutes : Int, seconds : Int }

values.name: defaultSettings
values.comment: The basic configuration for a TimePicker

values.name: init
values.comment: Function for initializing a closed and empty TimePicker

values.name: selectedTime
values.comment: Returns the current value of the time picker

values.name: update
values.comment: Function to update the model when messages come

values.name: view
values.comment: Function for viewing the time picker
